hero.headline: Source from 12,000 verified Chinese factories.
hero.tagline: Electronics, machinery, textiles, construction — direct from the factory floor with MOQ as low as 10 units, escrow protection, and door-to-door logistics across 27 African countries.

slide2.headline: Pay only when your goods pass inspection.
slide2.tagline: Every order is protected by platform-held escrow. Funds release to the supplier only after your inspection agent clears the cargo — zero risk on first-time orders.

slide3.headline: Door-to-door delivery across Africa.
slide3.tagline: Consolidated sea freight, express air cargo, and last-mile clearance in Lagos, Nairobi, Johannesburg, Cairo and 23 more. Live tracking from Shenzhen to your warehouse.

promo.headline: Free trade assurance on first 3 orders for new buyers.
promo.body: Sign up this month and pay zero platform escrow fees on your first three orders.

rfqBox.headline: Submit one RFQ. Get 5+ supplier quotes in 24 hours.

rail.title: New on Silk Road
rail.subtitle: Recently listed by verified Chinese suppliers.

editorial.title: Trade intelligence, written by people who ship every day.
editorial.guide1Desc: From canton fair sourcing to bonded warehouse delivery, what every African importer needs to know in 2026.
editorial.guide2Title: Mobile money checkout for B2B trade
editorial.guide2Desc: Why MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, and M-Pesa are reshaping how cross-border B2B settles — and what suppliers need to enable.
editorial.guide3Title: Shipping to East Africa: rates & lead times
editorial.guide3Desc: Sea, air, and overland — current freight benchmarks from Shenzhen to Mombasa, Dar, and Mogadishu.

cta.headline: Start sourcing today
cta.body: Join 50,000+ African businesses sourcing from verified Chinese manufacturers — with trade assurance on every order.

hero.headline: Export Africa's finest to the world's largest market.
hero.tagline: Coffee, cocoa, tea, minerals, spices, specialty crops — connect cooperatives and producers directly with verified Chinese importers. Fair-trade certified, full traceability, escrow paid in your local currency.

promo.headline: Zero listing fees for farmer cooperatives.
promo.body: Cooperatives with 50+ members get free verification and unlimited product listings for the first 12 months.

rfqBox.headline: Post a buy request. Get sample shipments in 14 days.

rail.title: New from Africa
rail.subtitle: Recently listed by verified cooperatives and producers.

editorial.title: Practical guides for African producers entering Chinese markets.
editorial.guide1Title: Exporting coffee to China: certifications & buyers
editorial.guide1Desc: Which Chinese buyers want African specialty coffee, what certifications open doors, and how to negotiate FOB pricing.
editorial.guide2Title: Cocoa traceability: chain of custody for premium pricing
editorial.guide2Desc: How blockchain-backed traceability earns 18-24% premium pricing from European and Chinese specialty buyers.
editorial.guide3Title: Mobile money payouts to cooperatives at scale
editorial.guide3Desc: How Silk Road settles bulk buyer payments out to thousands of cooperative members via MTN MoMo and Airtel Money.

cta.headline: List your harvest. Reach Chinese importers
cta.body: Cooperatives, estates, and producers — onboard your members in under a week and start receiving offers from verified importers.

twoUpValue.tradeAssuranceBody: Funds held in escrow until delivery is confirmed. Disputes mediated by Silk Road operations — not the supplier, not the buyer.
twoUpValue.logisticsBody: Our fleet, our drivers, our bonded warehouses across 27 African countries. Real-time tracking, customs handling, insurance included.

howItWorks.title: Two continents. One platform. Four steps.
howItWorks.subtitle: From discovery to delivery, Silk Road handles the complexity of China–Africa trade so you can focus on growing your business.
howItWorks.flowChinaDesc: Electronics, machinery, textiles, construction materials, auto parts — direct from manufacturers with MOQ as low as 10 units.
howItWorks.flowAfricaTitle: Export Africa's finest to the world's largest market
howItWorks.flowAfricaDesc: Coffee, cocoa, tea, minerals, spices, and specialty crops — connecting cooperatives and producers directly with Chinese importers.
howItWorks.stepsSubtitle: From the first search to the last-mile delivery, Silk Road handles the complexity.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse verified suppliers, compare products, and find the best deals across categories.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Submit your requirements. Receive competitive quotes from multiple verified suppliers.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Pay via escrow or mobile money. Funds held safely until you confirm delivery and quality.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Door-to-door logistics with real-time tracking, customs documentation, and insurance.
howItWorks.ctaTitle: Ready to start your first order?
howItWorks.ctaBody: Free to join. No listing fees for the first 50 products.

about.title: Trade infrastructure for two continents.
about.subtitle: We connect Chinese manufacturers with African businesses — and African producers with Chinese importers — on a single B2B platform built for how this trade actually works: mobile-money payments, bonded logistics, multi-language support, and trade assurance on every order.
about.flowTitle: How trade flows on Silk Road
about.flowSubtitle: Two source markets. One platform. Verified suppliers and importers on both sides of every transaction.
about.metaDescription: How Silk Road Africa connects Chinese manufacturers with African businesses, and African producers with Chinese importers.
about.pillar1Body: Every transaction is held in escrow until you confirm delivery and quality. Disputes are mediated by Silk Road operations.
about.pillar2Body: Our own fleet, drivers, and bonded warehouses move goods door-to-door across 27+ African countries — not third-party carriers.
about.pillar3Body: MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, M-Pesa, Alipay, WeChat Pay, bank transfer. Pay the way your business already pays.
about.pillar4Body: KYC verification, factory inspections, and business license validation for every supplier and importer on the platform.
about.socialProofEyebrow: Trusted by Businesses Across Two Continents
about.ctaBody: Free to join. No listing fees for the first 50 products.

footer.newsletterBody: Sourcing trends, new supplier verticals, and shipping rates across the China–Africa corridor.

regionPicker.footer: Choices apply across the site. Currency conversions use mid-market rates updated daily.

home.heroTitle: The Silk Road, Reimagined for Africa
home.heroSubtitle: Connect with verified manufacturers and suppliers across China and Africa. Trade assurance, mobile payments, and logistics built for cross-continental B2B commerce.
home.step1Desc: Browse verified suppliers and compare pricing from manufacturers across China and Africa.
home.step2Desc: Submit RFQs and receive competitive quotations from multiple verified suppliers.
home.step3Desc: Pay securely through our platform. Funds are held until you confirm delivery.
home.step4Desc: Monitor your shipment in real-time from factory to your doorstep.

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.emptyDesc: Browse the marketplace to find products from verified suppliers.
cart.shipping: Shipping and taxes calculated at checkout

buyerRequest.metaTitle: Request what you need — Silk Road Africa
buyerRequest.metaDescription: Tell us what you're sourcing. Our team will find verified suppliers and come back to you within one business day.
buyerRequest.title: Tell us what you're looking for.
buyerRequest.subtitle: If you can't find the product on our marketplace, describe it here. A sourcing manager will follow up with verified supplier options, usually within one business day.
buyerRequest.sectionWhatSubtitle: The more detail, the faster we can match.
buyerRequest.sectionWhoSubtitle: We'll email and/or call you — no spam.
buyerRequest.name: Your name
buyerRequest.title: Product or item
buyerRequest.titlePlaceholder: e.g. 5G smartphones, kitchen sofas, baby formula
buyerRequest.descriptionPlaceholder: Specs, brands you've seen, intended use, any packaging or certification requirements…
buyerRequest.footnote: By submitting you agree we may contact you about this request. We never share your details with third parties.
buyerRequest.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
buyerRequest.successBody: A sourcing manager will email you shortly with next steps. You can close this tab.

landing.headline: Source African resources. Ship to China. One platform, LC-backed end-to-end.
landing.subhead: Metals, minerals, timber, agricultural commodities and raw materials from verified African producers. Letter-of-credit trade, third-party inspection, owned freight, USD/CNY settlement.

pillarTrade.title: LC-backed trade
pillarTrade.body: Orders transact against letters of credit under UCP 600 with document-controlled release. No third-party escrow — funds move bank-to-bank against inspection-verified BLs.

pillarFreight.title: Owned freight
pillarFreight.body: We hold carrier allocation with COSCO, Maersk and MSC and issue house BLs. Port-of-loading first-mile from mine or farm, marine insurance included.

pillarFx.title: Integrated FX
pillarFx.body: Lock USD/CNY or offshore CNH rates at quote stage. Onshore settlement via licensed partner bank; extended rate locks align with LC payment windows.

metals.title: Metals & Concentrates
metals.desc: Copper, cobalt, lithium, bauxite, iron ore, manganese, chrome, gold doré, 3TG metals with OECD due diligence.

minerals.title: Industrial & Precious Minerals
minerals.desc: Industrial minerals and precious stones including Kimberley-certified rough diamonds.

energy.title: Energy Materials
energy.desc: Coal, coke and energy-grade feedstocks for Chinese industrial and power markets.

timber.title: Timber & Wood
timber.desc: Hardwood and softwood logs, sawn timber, CITES-gated species with permit verification.

food.title: Food & Agri Products
food.desc: Cocoa, green coffee, cashew, sesame, soybean. GACC-registered exporters, phytosanitary handled.

raw_materials.title: Other Raw Materials
raw_materials.desc: Rubber, gum arabic, hides and other raw-material streams moving Africa → China.

listings.heading: Resource Listings
listings.emptyBody: Try clearing filters or browsing another category.

paywall.sendQuoteTitle: Sending quotes is a paid-tier feature
paywall.sendQuoteBody: Your supplier company must be on the Standard or Gold plan to submit quotations on this platform. Upgrade to respond to RFQs.
paywall.requestQuoteTitle: Requesting quotes is a paid-tier feature
paywall.requestQuoteBody: Your buyer company must be on the Standard or Gold plan to publish RFQs and receive quotations from verified African producers.

upgrade.heading: Unlock RFQ and quotation trading
upgrade.sub: A paid tier is required to publish RFQs or submit quotations. Pick a plan that matches your trade volume. Cancel anytime.
upgrade.footnote: Billed in USD. Invoicing in CNY available on Gold.

gold.name: Gold
gold.f4: Extended FX rate locks (up to 90 days)
